intent: Upgrade the plumbline CI gate pin from v0.3.0 to the latest release v0.4.1 in .github/workflows/plumbline.yml. v0.4.1 pins the diff base_sha AND accepts a rederived merge-base, which ends the stale-base re-stamp (REWORK) tax on clean rebases; it is back-compat with the existing receipt directory. Version-string change only — the gate logic lives in the plumbline package, not here. Touches .github/workflows/** (protected) so self_modifying=true and it routes to human review, correct for an enforcement-pipeline change.

validation_plan.reason: Pin resolves to the explicit v0.4.1 tag.

validation_plan.command: Plumbline Gate CI runs on this PR
validation_plan.reason: Live proof the gate resolves + runs.

execution_evidence.output_ref: Corroborated by the Plumbline Gate check on this PR head.

result_summary: Pinned the plumbline gate v0.3.0 -> v0.4.1 in .github/workflows/plumbline.yml. Version bump only; no repo logic changed. self_modifying=true (workflows protected) -> human review.
